nonGoals: Do NOT modify any other module
Do NOT change the existing tokenization strategy
objective: Verify existing `truncateWords` implementation passes all tests and has no undiscovered consumers; confirm issue #58 is complete.
planText: Run `npm run test` to confirm the existing `truncateWords` implementation (16+ test cases in `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/index.test.ts`) passes green alongside all other module tests. Confirm there are zero external consumers of `truncateWords` beyond the module's own barrel export. If tests pass and no unexpected consumers exist, the issue can be closed as already-complete with no code changes.
